name: What if insurance finds out I asked AI how much my injury claim is worth?
description: AI damage estimates can hurt your case in discovery—avoid it.[1]

mainEntity.name: What if insurance finds out I asked AI how much my injury claim is worth?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI damage estimates can hurt your case in discovery—avoid it.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Your AI prompts estimating damages can be requested in discovery and used to argue your expectations were unrealistic or inconsistent.[1] Opposing counsel could quote speculations about fault or events differing from your testimony.[1] Key factors: No privilege applies; AI disclaims legal advice; every prompt is potentially evidence.[1] Stop using AI for case strategy now; document everything through your attorney instead. Switch to privileged channels immediately.
